recommendations.title: The Most Hated Woman in America
recommendations.overview: The true story of Madalyn Murray O'Hair -- iconoclast, opportunist, and outspoken atheist -- from her controversial rise to her untimely demise.

recommendations.title: Ella Enchanted
recommendations.overview: Ella lives in a magical world in which each child, at the moment of their birth, is given a virtuous "gift" from a fairy godmother. Ella's so-called gift, however, is obedience. This birthright proves itself to be quite the curse once Ella finds hers

recommendations.title: Scream
recommendations.overview: A year after the murder of her mother, a teenage girl is terrorized by a masked killer who targets her and her friends by using scary movies as part of a deadly game.

recommendations.title: Girl in the Basement
recommendations.overview: Sara is a teen girl who is looking forward to her 18th birthday to move away from her controlling father Don. But before she could even blow out the candles, Don imprisons her in the basement of their home.

recommendations.title: Poltergeist
recommendations.overview: The Freelings' suburban home becomes the center of paranormal activity that opens a portal to the 'other side'. With help, they must cross over to get their daughter back.

recommendations.title: The Swimmer
recommendations.overview: A man spends a summer day swimming home via all the pools in his quiet suburban neighborhood.
